summary: Surah Al-Mutaffifin condemns fraud in measure and weight and warns of resurrection before the Lord of the worlds. The record of the wicked is in Sijjeen and that of the righteous is in Illiyin—sealed writings witnessed by the near ones. The pious recline in bliss, drink a sealed pure wine mixed with Tasneem, while the guilty once mocked believers but will be laughed at by believers on that Day.

groups.title: Section: Woe to those who short-change others yet demand full measure; do they not expect resurrection?
